docket_entries.description: (SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (RICK PARRAS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUNIDAD, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
